nasb.text: The Lord also said to Moses, “Go to the people and consecrate them today and tomorrow, and let them wash their garments;

esv.text: the Lord said to Moses, “Go to the people and consecrate them today and tomorrow, and let them wash their garments

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你到人民那裡去，要他們今天明天分別為聖，又要他們洗淨自己的衣服；

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“你现在回到他们那里，吩咐他们今天和明天要洁净自己，洗净衣服，
